name: My Approval Agent UI
description: Your assistant for Microsoft 365 approvals. Ask about your pending approval requests, review who requested them and their status, and approve, reject, or re-assign them, or contact the requester, without leaving the conversation.

conversation_starters.title: My pending approvals
conversation_starters.text: Show me my pending approval requests

conversation_starters.title: All my approvals
conversation_starters.text: Show all my approvals, including completed and canceled ones

conversation_starters.title: Approve or reject
conversation_starters.text: Help me approve or reject a pending approval

conversation_starters.title: Contact a requester
conversation_starters.text: I need to ask a requester for more information about their request
